title: Katawa Shoujo - Concord on Mario Paint Composer
description:
I break away from my usual style of upbeat and catchy songs for the sake of getting a video out. I find that if I'm too picky my channel stagnates for long periods of time.

This song is Lilly's theme from Katawa Shoujo, a free visual novel that you can download here:
http://katawa-shoujo.com/

OST: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WnqmshjB3pk

This song was composed by Sebastien Skaf, aka Nicol Armafi. Visit his channel here:
http://www.youtube.com/user/NicolArmarfi4

If you liked this video check out my cover of Rin's theme, Parity:
http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EGwa38iLGQI

I was drinking concord grape juice while making this video and didn't even realize it until just now! Thanks for watching!
